summary.en: Cloud platform delivering high-performance computing for engineering and R&D.
summary.zh: 為工程與研發提供高效能運算的雲端平台。

highlight.en: Rescale turns HPC, simulation, AI/ML and digital twins into a full-stack open platform with 1000+ pre-installed apps, used by 7 of the top 10 automakers.
highlight.zh: Rescale 將高效能運算、模擬、AI/ML 與數位孿生整合為全端開放平台,內建逾千款應用,獲全球前十大車廠中的七家採用。

summary.en: Socially responsible fintech offering mobile-first credit and savings products.
summary.zh: 以社會責任為使命、提供行動優先信貸與儲蓄產品的金融科技公司。

highlight.en: LendUp built all its technology in-house and framed every product as a 'ladder' to long-term financial health rather than a debt trap.
highlight.zh: LendUp 全部技術皆自行開發,並將每項產品定位為通往長期財務健康的「階梯」,而非債務陷阱。

summary.en: A modern staffing agency that helps businesses hire and manage W2 contractors.
summary.zh: 協助企業招募與管理 W2 約聘人員的新型人力派遣公司。

highlight.en: HireArt uses work samples and video assessments graded for culture fit and skills, placing contractors at companies like Facebook, Airbnb and Waymo.
highlight.zh: HireArt 以工作樣本與影片評測,從文化契合度與技能評估候選人,將約聘人員送進 Facebook、Airbnb、Waymo 等公司。

summary.en: Fleet intelligence platform bringing AI to auto-leasing and finance companies.
summary.zh: 將 AI 帶入汽車租賃與金融公司的車隊智慧平台。

highlight.en: Ridecell unifies 100+ fragmented systems into one intelligence layer, with AI agents processing 12M+ events daily across 500K+ assets in 14+ countries.
highlight.zh: Ridecell 將逾百套零散系統整合為單一智慧層,AI 代理每日處理逾 1200 萬筆事件,涵蓋 14 國逾 50 萬項資產。

summary.en: Values-based job search and hiring site for Gen Z and millennial candidates.
summary.zh: 以價值觀為核心,服務 Z 世代與千禧世代求職者的求職與招募網站。

highlight.en: The Muse matches candidates to companies by people, benefits and values, aiming for a more efficient hiring process and better employee retention.
highlight.zh: The Muse 依公司的團隊、福利與價值觀為求職者媒合,目標是讓招募更有效率、留任率更高。

summary.en: On-demand electronics manufacturing powered by a factory-scale robotics platform.
summary.zh: 以工廠級機器人平台驅動的隨選電子製造服務。

highlight.en: CircuitHub's robotics platform, The Grid, claims a 10x speed and cost improvement in small-batch production, with customers including Tesla, NASA and Zipline.
highlight.zh: CircuitHub 的機器人平台 The Grid 號稱讓小批量生產的速度與成本提升十倍,客戶包括 Tesla、NASA 與 Zipline。

summary.en: Online marketplace for shopping the world's best local boutiques.
summary.zh: 讓你線上選購全球頂尖在地精品店商品的市集。

highlight.en: Shoptiques brings unique, fashion-forward boutique inventory online with personalized shopping, sparing buyers from trawling hundreds of sites.
highlight.zh: Shoptiques 將獨特、走在時尚前端的精品店商品搬上網路並提供個人化選購,讓買家免於翻遍數百個網站。

summary.en: Smart search platform delivering relevant, customizable results for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業提供精準、可客製化搜尋結果的智慧搜尋平台。

highlight.en: Swiftype's Site Search, App Search and Enterprise Search products help organizations find information internally and on public sites; it joined Elastic.
highlight.zh: Swiftype 的站內搜尋、App 搜尋與企業搜尋產品,協助組織在內部與公開網站中找到資訊;後併入 Elastic。

summary.en: A college redesigning the bachelor's degree to prepare students for tech careers.
summary.zh: 重新設計學士學位、培養學生投入科技職涯的大學。

highlight.en: Make School blended liberal arts and software development with income-share tuition; 40% of students were underrepresented minorities and 50% low-income.
highlight.zh: Make School 將博雅教育與軟體開發結合,並採收入分潤學費;其學生中 40% 為弱勢族裔、50% 來自低收入家庭。

summary.en: An open platform for managing vacation rental businesses from one dashboard.
summary.zh: 讓度假租賃業者從單一儀表板管理業務的開放平台。

highlight.en: MyVR centralizes Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com and other channels while giving rentals their own site to grow direct bookings and automate daily tasks.
highlight.zh: MyVR 集中管理 Airbnb、Vrbo、Booking.com 等通路,同時提供自有網站以擴大直接訂房並自動化日常工作。

summary.en: A HIPAA-compliant messaging app for doctors to communicate quickly and securely.
summary.zh: 讓醫師快速、安全溝通的 HIPAA 合規通訊 App。

highlight.en: Medigram delivers reliable secure messaging across complex hospital networks and flags insights from clinician chats, cutting critical response times by 50%.
highlight.zh: Medigram 在複雜的醫院網路中提供可靠安全的訊息傳遞,並從臨床對話中標記洞見,將關鍵反應時間縮短 50%。

summary.en: Educational games and beautifully designed learning apps for iPhone and iPad.
summary.zh: 為 iPhone 與 iPad 打造的教育遊戲與精美學習 App。

highlight.en: Tap to Learn builds easy-to-use mobile apps that each focus on a single learning area, using interactivity to make learning fun.
highlight.zh: Tap to Learn 打造易上手的行動 App,每款聚焦單一學習領域,透過互動讓學習變得有趣。

summary.en: A Facebook ad optimization platform.
summary.zh: Facebook 廣告最佳化平台。

highlight.en: Optilly/Installmonetizer optimizes Facebook ad performance based on user attributes.
highlight.zh: Optilly/Installmonetizer 依使用者屬性最佳化 Facebook 廣告成效。

summary.en: Platform to discover and use consumer photos and videos of brands.
summary.zh: 探索並運用消費者拍攝品牌照片與影片的平台。

highlight.en: Chute powers enterprise user-generated content via visual and text search, then helps brands ideate, produce and amplify it for clients like adidas and the NBA.
highlight.zh: Chute 透過視覺與文字搜尋驅動企業用戶生成內容,協助 adidas、NBA 等品牌構思、製作並擴散這些素材。

summary.en: A house cleaning service bookable in real time from your iPhone or the web.
summary.zh: 可從 iPhone 或網頁即時預約的居家清潔服務。

highlight.en: Exec lets users book on-demand house cleaning in real time directly from their iPhone or the web.
highlight.zh: Exec 讓使用者直接從 iPhone 或網頁即時預約隨選居家清潔。

summary.en: A social club that arranges drinks between two groups of three friends.
summary.zh: 安排兩組各三位朋友一起喝酒的社交俱樂部。

highlight.en: Started in New York in 2011, Grouper set up drinks for groups of three across major US cities, with members sharing tens of thousands of drinks.
highlight.zh: Grouper 2011 年於紐約創立,在美國多座大城安排三人成組的聚會喝酒,會員已共享數萬次小酌。

summary.en: Builder of high-performance software defined radios for mission-critical uses.
summary.zh: 打造任務關鍵用高效能軟體定義無線電的公司。

highlight.en: Per Vices makes modular SDRs that replace multiple complex subsystems, lowering integration cost and time to market for wireless application developers.
highlight.zh: Per Vices 打造模組化軟體定義無線電,可取代多個複雜子系統,為無線應用開發者降低整合成本與上市時間。

summary.en: A people search engine indexing over a billion social network profiles.
summary.zh: 索引逾十億個社群檔案的人名搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Ark let users find new contacts, classmates and friends, claiming the world's most comprehensive people search with over a billion indexed social profiles.
highlight.zh: Ark 讓使用者尋找新聯絡人、同學與朋友,號稱以逾十億個社群檔案打造全球最完整的人名搜尋引擎。

summary.en: Mobile app for deals, coupons and cash back at your favorite stores.
summary.zh: 為你愛逛商店提供優惠、折價券與現金回饋的行動 App。

highlight.en: Shopular notifies users of personalized sales and coupons when near a store or mall, and was named by Time among the 50 best iPhone apps of 2013.
highlight.zh: Shopular 在使用者接近商店或商場時推播個人化促銷與折價券,並獲《時代》雜誌選為 2013 年 50 大 iPhone App。

summary.en: Software that helps farmers run more profitable businesses.
summary.zh: 協助農民經營更具獲利能力的軟體。

highlight.en: FarmLogs gives farmers timely, unbiased information to improve yield, eliminate waste and maximize the profitability of every acre.
highlight.zh: FarmLogs 為農民提供即時、客觀的資訊,以提升產量、減少浪費並讓每一畝地的獲利最大化。

summary.en: One-click screen sharing with installation-free viewing on any device.
summary.zh: 一鍵螢幕分享、任何裝置免安裝即可觀看。

highlight.en: Screenleap aims to do for screen sharing what Dropbox did for files, and offers an API that powers screen sharing inside other products and services.
highlight.zh: Screenleap 立志成為螢幕分享界的 Dropbox,並提供 API 讓其他產品與服務內建螢幕分享功能。

summary.en: Creates embeddable machine learning models for application developers.
summary.zh: 為應用開發者打造可嵌入機器學習模型的服務。

highlight.en: Developers submit data to Marft by web or API and receive optimized machine learning models implemented in the programming language of their choice.
highlight.zh: 開發者透過網頁或 API 向 Marft 提交資料,即可取得以指定程式語言實作的最佳化機器學習模型。

summary.en: Really secure peer-to-peer sending of large files.
summary.zh: 以點對點技術安全傳送大型檔案。

highlight.en: WireOver is a free, unlimited desktop app using peer-to-peer transfer, with Pro accounts adding strong end-to-end encryption for private file sending.
highlight.zh: WireOver 是免費、無限量的桌面 App,採點對點傳輸,Pro 帳戶另提供強大的端對端加密以私密傳送檔案。

summary.en: In-app live chat and customer communication tools for mobile developers.
summary.zh: 為行動開發者提供 App 內即時聊天與客戶溝通工具。

highlight.en: Hipmob bundles live chat, helpdesk and feedback tools with real-time context like device, OS and location so mobile businesses can act to lift sales.
highlight.zh: Hipmob 整合即時聊天、客服與回饋工具,並提供裝置、作業系統與位置等即時情境,助行動業者採取行動提升銷售。

summary.en: A BI bridge that automatically structures unstructured data for analysis.
summary.zh: 自動將非結構化資料結構化以供分析的 BI 橋接平台。

highlight.en: Amiato's real-time service moves data from flexible databases like MongoDB into BI tools with zero setup, getting customers running in a day via Schema-lift.
highlight.zh: Amiato 的即時服務以零設定將 MongoDB 等彈性資料庫的資料導入 BI 工具,憑 Schema-lift 技術讓客戶一天內上線。

summary.en: App that connects two phones into a private timeline for partners to share.
summary.zh: 連結兩支手機、為伴侶建立私密分享時間軸的 App。

highlight.en: Born when its founders struggled to stay in touch with partners during YC, Couple grew to over two million downloads and a billion messages sent.
highlight.zh: Couple 源於創辦人在 YC 期間難與伴侶聯繫的困擾,後累積逾兩百萬次下載、傳送超過十億則訊息。

summary.en: A real-time collaborative wiki and documents tool for getting things done.
summary.zh: 用來完成工作的即時協作維基與文件工具。

highlight.en: Hackpad offers smart collaborative documents for company wikis, personal notes, event planning and classroom collaboration.
highlight.zh: Hackpad 提供智慧協作文件,適用於公司維基、個人筆記、活動規劃與課堂協作。

summary.en: Banking and payment platform APIs for accepting in-person card payments.
summary.zh: 用於受理當面刷卡的銀行與支付平台 API。

highlight.en: SlidePay (formerly Cube) is an API that lets any app accept in-person credit card payments on any platform with integration taking hours, not weeks.
highlight.zh: SlidePay(前身為 Cube)是讓任何 App 在任何平台受理當面信用卡付款的 API,整合只需數小時而非數週。

summary.en: A private place for families to stay in touch and share their lives.
summary.zh: 讓家人保持聯繫、分享生活的私密空間。

highlight.en: FamilyLeaf gives families a private page to share photos, life updates, contact info and messages, treating family as an overlooked social network.
highlight.zh: FamilyLeaf 為家庭提供私密頁面,分享照片、生活近況、聯絡資訊與訊息,視家庭為一個被忽略的社交網絡。

summary.en: Simple, on-demand multiplayer game servers.
summary.zh: 簡單、隨選的多人遊戲伺服器。

highlight.en: Minefold runs servers for popular games like Minecraft and Team Fortress 2 that can be created in under 30 seconds, with players paying by the hour.
highlight.zh: Minefold 為 Minecraft、Team Fortress 2 等熱門遊戲架設伺服器,30 秒內即可建立,玩家按小時付費。

summary.en: Instantly talk or text one friend or a group at once on your smartphone.
summary.zh: 在智慧型手機上即時與一位朋友或群組通話或傳訊。

highlight.en: Talkray (TiKL) turns a smartphone into a push-to-talk walkie-talkie, free on both Android and iPhone.
highlight.zh: Talkray(TiKL)將智慧型手機變成一鍵通話的對講機,於 Android 與 iPhone 上皆免費提供。

summary.en: A cloud platform for data analysis — build apps, not infrastructure.
summary.zh: 用於資料分析的雲端平台——打造應用而非基礎設施。

highlight.en: Zillabyte handles the data infrastructure so users develop and test apps locally, adding geocoding, fraud analysis or web scraping via modular components.
highlight.zh: Zillabyte 代為打理資料基礎設施,讓使用者在本地開發測試應用,並以模組化元件加入地理編碼、詐欺分析或網路爬取。

summary.en: Maker of social mobile MMO games for Android and iOS.
summary.zh: 開發 Android 與 iOS 社交手機 MMO 遊戲的公司。

highlight.en: LVL6 creates social mobile massively multiplayer games for the Android and iOS platforms.
highlight.zh: LVL6 為 Android 與 iOS 平台開發社交型大型多人線上手機遊戲。

summary.en: A marketplace where women buy, sell and trade fashion with each other.
summary.zh: 讓女性彼此買賣、交換時尚單品的市集。

highlight.en: Founded in Australia after the founder tired of buying clothes she rarely wore again, 99dresses let women trade fashion online and expanded to the US.
highlight.zh: 99dresses 在創辦人厭倦買了卻很少再穿的衣服後於澳洲創立,讓女性線上交換時尚單品,並擴展至美國。

summary.en: A dating app using ephemeral video and live eye contact to spark matches.
summary.zh: 以限時影片與即時眼神接觸促成配對的交友 App。

highlight.en: On Flutter, users record short ephemeral videos and must look into each other's eyes for 15 seconds while both online to actually match, like a live Tinder.
highlight.zh: 在 Flutter 上,使用者錄製限時短影片,須在雙方同時上線時凝視彼此眼睛 15 秒才能真正配對,宛如即時版 Tinder。

summary.en: Cloud storage for photos and videos, later acquired by Dropbox.
summary.zh: 用於照片與影片的雲端儲存服務,後由 Dropbox 收購。

highlight.en: Loom provided dedicated cloud storage for users' photos and videos before being acquired by Dropbox.
highlight.zh: Loom 為使用者照片與影片提供專屬雲端儲存,後遭 Dropbox 收購。

summary.en: Helps companies turn their data into great stories.
summary.zh: 協助企業將資料化為精彩故事的公司。

highlight.en: Originally a price guide for used goods, Priceonomics evolved to help companies turn their data into compelling narratives and content.
highlight.zh: Priceonomics 起初是二手商品價格指南,後轉型協助企業將資料轉化為引人入勝的敘事與內容。

summary.en: Brings clarity and workflow to the deal and contract process.
summary.zh: 為交易與合約流程帶來清晰度與工作流的工具。

highlight.en: Glider helps companies of all sizes stay focused on their business rather than babysitting contracts, backed by True Ventures and TechStars.
highlight.zh: Glider 協助各種規模的公司專注本業,而非緊盯合約,並獲 True Ventures 與 TechStars 投資。

summary.en: A tool that helps pharmacists find funding for patients who can't afford meds.
summary.zh: 協助藥師為無力負擔藥費的病患尋找補助的工具。

highlight.en: Medmonk fights medication non-adherence by partnering with drugmakers, pharmacies and health plans to provide financial assistance for chronic therapy.
highlight.zh: Medmonk 透過與藥廠、藥局與健保方合作為慢性病治療提供財務協助,以對抗病患不按時服藥的問題。

summary.en: A search engine for used cars.
summary.zh: 二手車搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Carsabi is a dedicated search engine for finding used cars.
highlight.zh: Carsabi 是專為尋找二手車打造的搜尋引擎。

summary.en: A collaborative learning platform for software developers.
summary.zh: 為軟體開發者打造的協作學習平台。

highlight.en: CoderWall is a San Francisco-based platform where software developers collaborate to improve their programming knowledge.
highlight.zh: CoderWall 是位於舊金山的平台,讓軟體開發者協作以提升程式知識。

summary.en: Maker of jellyfish aquariums sold with live jellyfish and accessories.
summary.zh: 製作水母水族箱並販售活體水母與配件的公司。

highlight.en: Jellyfish Art sells specialized tanks with engineered water flow plus live jellyfish shipped overnight anywhere in the US, as the flagship site of AnyVivo.
highlight.zh: Jellyfish Art 販售具特殊水流設計的專用水缸與可隔夜寄送全美的活體水母,為 AnyVivo 的旗艦網站。

summary.en: App to record and share HD videos with real-time stabilization and filters.
summary.zh: 具即時防手震與濾鏡功能、可錄製分享高畫質影片的 App。

highlight.en: Luma (formerly Midnox) lets you apply video stabilization, filters and zoom even after recording, then follow friends to watch and comment on their videos.
highlight.zh: Luma(前身為 Midnox)讓你即使錄完影片後仍能套用防手震、濾鏡與縮放,並追蹤朋友觀看與留言。

summary.en: A customizable spaced-repetition flashcard app for learning vocabulary.
summary.zh: 用於學習單字、可自訂間隔重複的字卡 App。

highlight.en: CleverDeck packs over three thousand useful words with images, native-speaker audio and example sentences to teach foreign-language vocabulary.
highlight.zh: CleverDeck 收錄逾三千個實用單字,並搭配圖片、母語者錄音與例句來教授外語詞彙。

summary.en: A celebrity charity fundraising platform.
summary.zh: 名人慈善募款平台。

highlight.en: GiveSpark operated as a platform for celebrity-driven charity fundraising.
highlight.zh: GiveSpark 經營一個以名人為號召的慈善募款平台。

summary.en: An OpenTable-style booking platform for tour operators.
summary.zh: 類似 OpenTable 的旅遊業者預訂平台。

highlight.en: BookSolid positioned itself as the OpenTable for tour operators, bringing online reservations to the tour industry.
highlight.zh: BookSolid 定位為旅遊業者的 OpenTable,為旅遊業帶來線上預訂。

summary.en: A deal search service.
summary.zh: 優惠搜尋服務。

highlight.en: Zipio is a search service for finding deals.
highlight.zh: Zipio 是用於尋找優惠的搜尋服務。

summary.en: GitHub for designers — automatic version control for design work.
summary.zh: 設計師的 GitHub——為設計工作自動進行版本控管。

highlight.en: Pixelapse simplifies version control for designers, making it easy to track revisions and share and discuss work with colleagues and the world.
highlight.zh: Pixelapse 為設計師簡化版本控管,讓他們輕鬆追蹤修訂,並與同事及世界分享、討論作品。

summary.en: A new way to host websites, as simple as saving files in Dropbox.
summary.zh: 如同在 Dropbox 存檔般簡單的全新網站代管方式。

highlight.en: Brace gives users a Draft version for iteration and collaboration plus a Production version optimized for performance and scale, updated by saving to Dropbox.
highlight.zh: Brace 提供供迭代協作的 Draft 版與為效能與擴展最佳化的 Production 版,只需存檔至 Dropbox 即可更新。

summary.en: A kid's first smartphone with web-based parental controls.
summary.zh: 附網頁端家長控管的兒童第一支智慧型手機。

highlight.en: Kyte locks any Android phone to pre-approved calls and games, letting parents track GPS, set time limits and block SMS or apps during school and bedtime.
highlight.zh: Kyte 將任何 Android 手機鎖定為僅限預核可的通話與遊戲,讓家長追蹤 GPS、設定使用時限,並在上課與就寢時段封鎖簡訊或 App。

summary.en: Client-side encryption for your devices and the cloud.
summary.zh: 為你的裝置與雲端提供用戶端加密。

highlight.en: Nouvou (Documents.Me) provides mobile file sharing and encryption solutions for enterprises from its Santa Clara base, founded in 2011.
highlight.zh: Nouvou(Documents.Me)自加州 Santa Clara 為企業提供行動檔案分享與加密方案,成立於 2011 年。

summary.en: Sysadmin as a service for deploying, configuring and monitoring systems.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供系統管理,負責部署、設定與監控。

highlight.en: SolidStage offered system administration as a service, handling deployment, configuration and monitoring so teams need not run their own ops.
highlight.zh: SolidStage 以服務形式提供系統管理,代為處理部署、設定與監控,讓團隊無須自行維運。

summary.en: The easiest way to capture and share videos with friends and family.
summary.zh: 與親友拍攝分享影片最簡單的方式。

highlight.en: Socialcam is a mobile video app for iPhone and Android that makes capturing, sharing and viewing high-quality movies of life's moments fast and fun.
highlight.zh: Socialcam 是 iPhone 與 Android 的行動影片 App,讓拍攝、分享與觀看生活片刻的高畫質影片變得快速又有趣。

summary.en: Platform for building Voice AI agents across WhatsApp, SMS and chat.
summary.zh: 用於跨 WhatsApp、SMS 與聊天打造語音 AI 代理的平台。

highlight.en: Plivo lets businesses deploy Voice AI agents for support, marketing and lead qualification, powering billions of yearly transactions for Uber, Meta and Zomato.
highlight.zh: Plivo 讓企業部署用於客服、行銷與名單篩選的語音 AI 代理,為 Uber、Meta、Zomato 等每年驅動數十億筆交易。

summary.en: The best way to launch, manage and measure social impact programs.
summary.zh: 推動、管理與衡量社會影響力計畫的最佳工具。

highlight.en: Submittable is used by thousands of companies, governments and philanthropies, having run 134,000 programs and collected nearly 22 million applications.
highlight.zh: Submittable 獲數千家企業、政府與慈善機構採用,已執行 134,000 項計畫並收集近 2200 萬份申請。

summary.en: A private-sector alternative to Healthcare.gov.
summary.zh: Healthcare.gov 的民間替代方案。

highlight.en: HealthSherpa operates as a private-sector version of Healthcare.gov for enrolling in health insurance.
highlight.zh: HealthSherpa 以民間版本的 Healthcare.gov 運作,協助投保健康保險。

summary.en: Secure, open-source collaboration platform for technical and operational teams.
summary.zh: 為技術與營運團隊打造的安全開源協作平台。

highlight.en: Mattermost serves high-security customers like the U.S. Department of Defense and major banks, co-built with 4,000+ open source contributors in 20 languages.
highlight.zh: Mattermost 服務美國國防部與大型銀行等高安全需求客戶,並與逾 4000 名開源貢獻者共同打造,支援 20 種語言。

summary.en: A communication app connecting K-8 teachers, kids and families.
summary.zh: 連結 K-8 教師、孩童與家庭的溝通 App。

highlight.en: ClassDojo has grown entirely by word of mouth into the world's largest network for kids, reaching over 51 million users across 180 countries monthly.
highlight.zh: ClassDojo 全憑口碑成長為全球最大的兒童網絡,每月觸及 180 國逾 5100 萬名使用者。

summary.en: Online personal styling for men using human stylists and AI.
summary.zh: 結合真人造型師與 AI 的男士線上個人造型服務。

highlight.en: After a short questionnaire and photos, Thread pairs each man with a stylist who uses its algorithm to sort thousands of items into tailored outfits.
highlight.zh: 在簡短問卷與上傳照片後,Thread 為每位男士配對造型師,並以演算法從數千件商品中挑出量身打造的穿搭。

summary.en: A single API to access, personalize and embed end-user content.
summary.zh: 單一 API 即可存取、個人化並嵌入終端用戶內容。

highlight.en: Filestack helps 100,000 apps handle the full file journey, adding custom machine learning models and enhanced upload reliability; acquired by Xenon Ventures.
highlight.zh: Filestack 協助 10 萬款 App 處理完整檔案流程,並加入自訂機器學習模型與更可靠的上傳;後由 Xenon Ventures 收購。

summary.en: Marketing analytics platform for the world's biggest brand marketers.
summary.zh: 為全球最大品牌行銷者打造的行銷分析平台。

highlight.en: Upwave uses data science and machine learning to show whether brand advertising works, serving blue-chip marketers like Unilever, Verizon and American Express.
highlight.zh: Upwave 運用資料科學與機器學習揭示品牌廣告是否奏效,服務 Unilever、Verizon、American Express 等頂級行銷客戶。

summary.en: Education company creating customized video content for school courses.
summary.zh: 為學校課程製作客製化影片內容的教育公司。

highlight.en: Study Edge develops customized video content for middle-school, high-school and college courses with universities and education agencies; acquired by Carlyle.
highlight.zh: Study Edge 與大學及教育機構合作,為國中、高中與大學課程製作並發行客製化影片內容;後由 Carlyle 收購。

summary.en: An end-to-end crowdfunding platform built for today's creators.
summary.zh: 為當今創作者打造的端到端群眾募資平台。

highlight.en: Since 2012 BackerKit's Pledge Manager has simplified Kickstarter and Indiegogo campaigns; in 2022 it launched its own end-to-end crowdfunding platform.
highlight.zh: BackerKit 的 Pledge Manager 自 2012 年起簡化 Kickstarter 與 Indiegogo 募資活動,2022 年更推出自有的端到端群募平台。

summary.en: No-code end-to-end testing that integrates with any CI/CD pipeline.
summary.zh: 可整合任何 CI/CD 流程的無程式碼端到端測試。

highlight.en: Rainforest's no-code platform automates end-to-end software testing within any CI/CD pipeline, helping teams improve quality and move faster without a QA team.
highlight.zh: Rainforest 的無程式碼平台在任何 CI/CD 流程中自動化端到端軟體測試,讓團隊無須 QA 團隊也能提升品質、加快步調。

summary.en: A global cross-platform entertainment media network with a mission to make the world happier.
summary.zh: 以讓世界更快樂為使命的全球跨平台娛樂媒體網絡。

highlight.en: Founded in 2008, 9GAG reaches 150 million people, ranks #1 globally in entertainment and gaming social media, and serves 2.2 billion social video views monthly.
highlight.zh: 9GAG 成立於 2008 年,觸及 1.5 億人,為全球娛樂與遊戲社群媒體第一名,每月散播 22 億次社群影片觀看。

summary.en: Making ecommerce simple by connecting brands with sales channels.
summary.zh: 連結品牌與銷售通路、讓電商變簡單的平台。

highlight.en: Zentail automates formatting listings for different marketplaces, making adding a sales channel as simple as adding a friend on Facebook.
highlight.zh: Zentail 自動為不同市集調整商品上架格式,讓新增銷售通路像在 Facebook 加好友一樣簡單。

summary.en: A platform to plan, book and manage global and group travel.
summary.zh: 用於規劃、預訂與管理全球及團體旅遊的平台。

highlight.en: Flightfox combines technology with human expertise to manage complex travel for study abroad programs, humanitarian organizations and other global groups.
highlight.zh: Flightfox 結合技術與人力專業,為留學專案、人道組織等全球活動的團體管理複雜的旅程。

summary.en: A 360-degree virtual reality advertising platform for brands and publishers.
summary.zh: 為品牌與出版商打造的 360 度虛擬實境廣告平台。

highlight.en: OmniVirt lets audiences view 360° VR content with one tap on phones, tablets and websites — no app or headset needed — serving ads across 200+ countries.
highlight.zh: OmniVirt 讓觀眾在手機、平板與網站上一鍵觀看 360° VR 內容,免下載 App 或頭戴裝置,廣告觸及逾 200 國。

summary.en: A destination for short K-12 educational video lessons from great teachers.
summary.zh: 匯集優秀教師 K-12 短影音課程的學習平台。

highlight.en: Knowmia gathers short video lessons from teachers everywhere and helps students find the right teacher for their style to tackle topics and prepare for tests.
highlight.zh: Knowmia 匯集各地教師的短影音課程,協助學生依自身學習風格找到合適老師,以攻克難題並準備考試。

summary.en: Automated customer analytics for small and medium-sized businesses.
summary.zh: 為中小型企業提供自動化客戶分析。

highlight.en: Canopy Labs tracks and optimizes each customer's buying journey so businesses can target campaigns and prioritize leads for maximum revenue and sales growth.
highlight.zh: Canopy Labs 追蹤並最佳化每位顧客的購買歷程,讓企業精準投放行銷活動並排序潛在客戶,以最大化營收與業績成長。

summary.en: Mobile screen recording and sharing products for gameplay and beyond.
summary.zh: 用於遊戲畫面及更多場景的手機螢幕錄製與分享產品。

highlight.en: Over five years Kamcord built three products: a gameplay recording SDK on 200M devices, a live streaming community at 2M MAU/$2M ARR, and a screen-record app.
highlight.zh: Kamcord 五年內打造三項產品:裝載於 2 億台裝置的遊戲錄製 SDK、月活躍 200 萬與年營收 200 萬美元的直播社群,以及一款螢幕錄製社交 App。

summary.en: A mobile on-device profiling and ad-serving platform.
summary.zh: 行動端裝置上的用戶側寫與廣告投放平台。

highlight.en: Mth Sense tackles 'blind' ads by offering an audience library that lets advertisers target specific demographics and psychographics on-device.
highlight.zh: Mth Sense 透過提供受眾資料庫對抗「盲目」廣告,讓廣告主在裝置端鎖定特定人口與心理特徵。

summary.en: An open medical intelligence system mapping the steps to help any patient.
summary.zh: 繪製協助任何病患步驟的開放醫療智慧系統。

highlight.en: The Human Diagnosis Project combines collective intelligence with machine learning to enable more accurate, affordable and accessible care for all.
highlight.zh: Human Diagnosis Project 結合群體智慧與機器學習,讓所有人都能獲得更精準、可負擔且易取得的照護。

summary.en: Integrates Excel with Python to speed up and automate spreadsheets.
summary.zh: 將 Excel 與 Python 整合,加速並自動化試算表工作的工具。

highlight.en: DataNitro is the easiest way to move data in and out of Excel, automate workflows and run sophisticated math, statistical and financial calculations in sheets.
highlight.zh: DataNitro 是將資料進出 Excel、自動化工作流程,並在試算表中執行進階數學、統計與財務運算最簡單的方式。

summary.en: A data-driven customer success platform for B2B SaaS companies.
summary.zh: 為 B2B SaaS 公司打造的數據驅動客戶成功平台。

highlight.en: Natero is the only customer success solution combining predictive analytics, customer intelligence and workflow management to help managers cut churn.
highlight.zh: Natero 是唯一結合預測分析、客戶情報與工作流管理的客戶成功方案,協助經理降低流失並擴大續約。

summary.en: A digital platform automating business development between brands and startups.
summary.zh: 自動化品牌與新創之間商業開發的數位平台。

highlight.en: Partnered runs an exclusive, access-controlled digital network that connects leading brands with emerging technology companies.
highlight.zh: Partnered 經營一個須申請存取的專屬數位網絡,連結領導品牌與新興科技公司。

summary.en: Big data for startup investing — track and discover fast-growing companies.
summary.zh: 為新創投資而生的大數據——追蹤並發掘快速成長的公司。

highlight.en: Mattermark collects comprehensive data on the world's fastest-growing companies, used by 500+ firms to discover leads, prioritize prospects and lift conversion.
highlight.zh: Mattermark 蒐集全球成長最快公司的完整資料,獲逾 500 家公司用於發掘潛在客戶、排序對象並提升轉換率。

summary.en: An interior design marketplace and online retailer.
summary.zh: 室內設計市集與線上零售商。

highlight.en: Tastemaker aims to make hiring an interior decorator easy, fun and affordable so everyone can have a beautiful home with a little help from a pro.
highlight.zh: Tastemaker 致力讓聘請室內設計師變得簡單、有趣又實惠,使人人都能在專業協助下擁有美麗的家。

summary.en: A cross-store wedding registry that consolidates gifts onto one list.
summary.zh: 將禮物整合於單一清單的跨店婚禮禮品登記服務。

highlight.en: RegistryLove was the first registry to span independent retailers and big-box stores, consolidating products, services and even a honeymoon onto one list.
highlight.zh: RegistryLove 是首個橫跨獨立零售商與大型賣場的禮品登記服務,讓新人將商品、服務甚至蜜月整合於同一份清單。

summary.en: An automatic journal to record your life and store it forever.
summary.zh: 自動記錄你的生活並永久保存的日記服務。

highlight.en: Everyday.me works as an automatic journal that helps you record your life and store it forever.
highlight.zh: Everyday.me 作為自動日記,協助你記錄生活並永久保存。

summary.en: A platform for taking pre-orders and crowdfunding independently.
summary.zh: 用於受理預購與獨立群眾募資的平台。

highlight.en: Celery is a single stop for brands to take pre-orders and crowdfund independently, continuing to sell before and after items are in stock.
highlight.zh: Celery 是品牌受理預購與獨立群募的一站式平台,讓商品在到貨前後都能持續銷售。

summary.en: Maker of Double, the world's leading telepresence robot.
summary.zh: 打造全球領先的遠端臨場機器人 Double 的公司。

highlight.en: Double Robotics puts an iPad video call on a mobile base, letting remote workers roam the office freely and feel present without scheduling a meeting.
highlight.zh: Double Robotics 將 iPad 視訊通話置於可移動底座,讓遠端工作者無須預約會議即可自在穿梭辦公室、產生實體臨場感。

summary.en: A 'transparent opaque' airfare and hotel booking site and travel technology company.
summary.zh: 一家提供「透明不透明」機票與飯店預訂的旅遊科技公司。

highlight.en: GetGoing pairs travel search, booking and advertising with award-winning design to serve Fortune 500 corporations, airlines, hotel chains and online retailers.
highlight.zh: GetGoing 將旅遊搜尋、預訂與廣告結合屢獲殊榮的設計,服務財星 500 大企業、航空公司、連鎖飯店與線上零售商。

summary.en: Mobile application prototyping, now part of Google.
summary.zh: 行動應用原型設計工具,現為 Google 一部分。

highlight.en: Pixate's CSS-based engine let designers and developers build native mobile app prototypes that could be styled and updated at run-time; bought by Google.
highlight.zh: Pixate 以 CSS 為基礎的引擎讓設計師與開發者打造可在執行階段調整與更新樣式的原生手機 App 原型;2015 年由 Google 收購。

summary.en: The first online venture capital platform, investing from seed to growth.
summary.zh: 首個線上創投平台,從種子輪到成長期皆投資。

highlight.en: FundersClub created the first online venture capital platform, with a portfolio including Coinbase, Instacart, Webflow, GitLab, Flexport and Rippling.
highlight.zh: FundersClub 打造首個線上創投平台,投資組合涵蓋 Coinbase、Instacart、Webflow、GitLab、Flexport 與 Rippling。

summary.en: An interactive IDE that lets you modify running programs in real time.
summary.zh: 可即時修改執行中程式的互動式 IDE。

highlight.en: Light Table gives real-time feedback by letting developers modify running programs and embed websites or games; successor Eve aimed to bring code to everyone.
highlight.zh: Light Table 讓開發者修改執行中的程式並嵌入網站、遊戲等內容以提供即時回饋;其後繼者 Eve 旨在讓人人都能運用運算。

summary.en: Unlimited cloud storage for media, acquired by Box in June 2014.
summary.zh: 為媒體提供無限雲端儲存,2014 年 6 月由 Box 收購。

highlight.en: Streem acts as a magical drive living in the cloud that frees up device space while converting media on-the-fly for seamless access on any device or bandwidth.
highlight.zh: Streem 如同一個存於雲端的神奇磁碟,釋放裝置空間,並即時轉檔以在任何裝置或頻寬下流暢存取媒體。

summary.en: Automatically converts design files into working websites.
summary.zh: 自動將設計檔案轉換為可運作網站的工具。

highlight.en: Markupwand takes PSD files and generates HTML/CSS automatically, then asks a few questions to produce view templates with minimal backend developer input.
highlight.zh: Markupwand 接收 PSD 檔並自動產生 HTML/CSS,再透過幾個問題,以後端開發者少量輸入產生視圖樣板。

summary.en: Personalized, context-aware mobile travel guides for iPhone.
summary.zh: 為 iPhone 打造的個人化、情境感知行動旅遊導覽。

highlight.en: TomoGuides offers handcrafted iPhone travel guides that are free and work fully offline.
highlight.zh: TomoGuides 提供手工製作、免費且完全離線可用的 iPhone 旅遊導覽。

summary.en: Easy mailing lists.
summary.zh: 簡單易用的郵寄清單服務。

highlight.en: ZeroMailer provides a simple way to create and manage mailing lists.
highlight.zh: ZeroMailer 提供簡便的方式來建立與管理郵寄清單。
